Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 49 

OIP_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Other Inpatient Hospital Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of the Medicare claim payment amounts (CLM_PMT_AMT from each claim) in 
the other inpatient (OIP) settings for a given year. The algorithm includes only Institutional claims that 
ended during the year of the data file, and where the payment amount was >= $0. To obtain the
